sentiment: What we write outlives us — code for the moon, words read faster than eyes, machines learning to speak in our place.

stories.title: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer source code for command and lunar modules
stories.summary: The actual code that guided humans to the moon, open-sourced and still readable — a monument to precision that outlived its authors.

stories.title: Kimi K3 Is Competitive with Fable; Kimi K3 and Fable Is SoTA
stories.summary: Two AI models competing at the frontier — machines getting better at reasoning, faster than most expected.

stories.title: Show HN: ReadKinetic – a free, local-first speed reader for your own books
stories.summary: A tool that lets you read your own books faster, words streaming past like a river you chose to enter.
